description: CompositionGrey and black round neck T-shirt for men made of 100% polyester, has short raglan sleeves, meshed panels on the sides, an asymmetric panel on the left hem with a contrast colour and nike swoosh printed on the right chestFitRegularWash careMachine wash separately in cold water using a mild detergentDo not bleachTumble dry lowCool iron; do not iron on decorationsDesigned for training needs, this nike T-shirt is made of polyester fabric with Dri-Fit technology to offer absolute sweat-free, fresh comfort. Such properties make it ideal not just for training, but playing any sport even on a hot day. Team this with performance shorts and sports shoes, or tracks and floaters for unparalleled cool.
